scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run dev -w @mirai/api" "npm run dev:worker -w @mirai/api" "npm run dev -w @mirai/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mirai/api && npm run typecheck -w @mirai/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @mirai/api && npm run lint -w @mirai/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @mirai/api && npm run build -w @mirai/web
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test
